query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.passwordHash, c.companyCode, c.companyName
FROM users u
JOIN erp_companies c ON u.erpCompanyId = c.id
WHERE (c.companyCode LIKE '%test%' OR c.companyName LIKE '%test%' OR c.companyCode LIKE '%ERIC%')
  AND u.role IN ('super_admin', 'admin')
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute
